mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 24-month rolling window, or positive return frequency drops below 52% during rate decline periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 6.0%, it signals a deteriorating labor market that reduces corporate earnings expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.0%, or the signal loses predictive power with a t-statistic below 1.5 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer demand expansion, which amplifies corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform individual series in multivariate regression, or forward returns are negative in greater than 55% of co-movement instances.

mechanism_narrative: In a high inflation environment, rising consumer price indices force markets to price in aggressive monetary tightening, causing immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or becomes statistically insignificant when CPIAUCSL exceeds 230, or 20-day forward returns are positive in greater than 65% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening economic output and capacity utilization, which directly supports corporate profit margins and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 24-month windows, or positive return frequency drops below 50% during sustained INDPRO uptrends.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth decelerates below 0.5%, it indicates a stalling economy that reduces equity risk appetite, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of low-growth quarters, or the threshold fails to separate return distributions with a p-value greater than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising total nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market tightening, which boosts consumer spending expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression, or forward returns are negative in greater than 55% of co-occurring instances.

mechanism_narrative: During stagflationary conditions, falling industrial production alongside rising inflation compresses corporate margins and triggers risk-off flows, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict negative returns when inflation exceeds 3% year-over-year, or 60-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60% of stagflation instances.
